info.description: The P commandline tool supports two commands (or modes): compile or check.

options.description:
p compile --help                     for P compiler help
p check --help                       for P checker help
================================================================================
~~ [PTool]: Thanks for using P! ~~

commands.name: compile | check
commands.description:
'compile' to run the P compiler and
'check' to run the P checker on the compiled code
